item.title: 101st Airborne Paratrooper Memories
item.description: A veteran of the 101st Airborne reflects on his memories as a paratrooper, offering a firsthand look at service, training, and wartime experience.

media:content.media:title: 101st Airborne Paratrooper Memories
media:content.media:description: A veteran of the 101st Airborne reflects on his memories as a paratrooper, offering a firsthand look at service, training, and wartime experience.

item.title: Frank DeVita’s D-Day Witness at Omaha Beach
item.description: Frank DeVita, 19, served in the first wave at Omaha Beach on June 6, 1944. He later shared his story to honor the men who never came home.

media:content.media:title: Frank DeVita’s D-Day Witness at Omaha Beach
media:content.media:description: Frank DeVita, 19, served in the first wave at Omaha Beach on June 6, 1944. He later shared his story to honor the men who never came home.

item.title: D-Day Reflections from Normandy
item.description: Chris Pratt shares Sgt. John Ellery’s D-Day reflection and the story of Allied troops landing in Normandy on June 6, 1944.

media:content.media:title: D-Day Reflections from Normandy
media:content.media:description: Chris Pratt shares Sgt. John Ellery’s D-Day reflection and the story of Allied troops landing in Normandy on June 6, 1944.

item.title: Buck Compton on Brécourt Manor
item.description: L.T. Lynn “Buck” Compton reflects on his firsthand experience at Brécourt Manor and how it differed from Band of Brothers.

media:content.media:title: Buck Compton on Brécourt Manor
media:content.media:description: L.T. Lynn “Buck” Compton reflects on his firsthand experience at Brécourt Manor and how it differed from Band of Brothers.

item.title: Why Vietnam Helicopter Pilots Faced Danger
item.description: A look at why flying helicopters in Vietnam was so dangerous, with a focus on the risks faced by pilots in wartime service.

media:content.media:title: Why Vietnam Helicopter Pilots Faced Danger
media:content.media:description: A look at why flying helicopters in Vietnam was so dangerous, with a focus on the risks faced by pilots in wartime service.

item.title: WWII Marine’s Survival at Guam and Iwo Jima
item.description: A WWII Marine reflects on survival at Guam and Iwo Jima, sharing firsthand memories of service, endurance, and the realities of war.

media:content.media:title: WWII Marine’s Survival at Guam and Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: A WWII Marine reflects on survival at Guam and Iwo Jima, sharing firsthand memories of service, endurance, and the realities of war.

item.title: Joe Mazzello on a Defining Role
item.description: Joe Mazzello reflects on the role that changed his path, in a conversation shared by the American Veterans Center.

media:content.media:title: Joe Mazzello on a Defining Role
media:content.media:description: Joe Mazzello reflects on the role that changed his path, in a conversation shared by the American Veterans Center.

item.title: Grounded From Flying Because of Skin Color
item.description: A veteran reflects on being grounded from flying because of his skin color, sharing a firsthand account of service, discrimination, and military history.

media:content.media:title: Grounded From Flying Because of Skin Color
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on being grounded from flying because of his skin color, sharing a firsthand account of service, discrimination, and military history.

item.title: Taking the Fight to Nazi Germany in a B-17
item.description: A veteran reflects on flying a B-17 Flying Fortress over Nazi Germany, sharing a firsthand wartime account of service, courage, and history.

media:content.media:title: Taking the Fight to Nazi Germany in a B-17
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on flying a B-17 Flying Fortress over Nazi Germany, sharing a firsthand wartime account of service, courage, and history.

item.title: August Bolino’s D-Day Memory
item.description: August Bolino recalled D-Day and his 30 combat missions with the 388th Bomber Group. His service earned the Distinguished Flying Cross and Air Medal.

media:content.media:title: August Bolino’s D-Day Memory
media:content.media:description: August Bolino recalled D-Day and his 30 combat missions with the 388th Bomber Group. His service earned the Distinguished Flying Cross and Air Medal.

item.title: August Bolino’s D-Day Memory
item.description: August Bolino recalled D-Day from a B-17 crew, flying 30 combat missions and earning the Distinguished Flying Cross and Air Medal.

media:content.media:title: August Bolino’s D-Day Memory
media:content.media:description: August Bolino recalled D-Day from a B-17 crew, flying 30 combat missions and earning the Distinguished Flying Cross and Air Medal.
